beats.label: MIND BLOWN
beats.quote: Earn big money in little time.
beats.spoken: You can earn ₹10 lakh in just 15 seconds.

caption.text: You can earn ₹10 lakh in just 15 seconds.

beats.headline: ₹10 LAKH IN SECONDS

beats.label: WILD STAT
beats.spoken: Top YouTubers are raking in ₹5 to ₹12 lakh monthly.

caption.text: Top YouTubers are raking in ₹5 to ₹12 lakh monthly.

beats.subtext: Flying Beast and Slayy Point lead the pack.
beats.headline: TOP EARNERS

asset_hint.prompt: A YouTuber showing off their earnings with a phone in hand, surrounded by excitement.

beats.label: INSIDER TIP
beats.quote: You don't need a badge to earn cash.
beats.spoken: No need to be a YouTube Partner to earn big.

caption.text: No need to be a YouTube Partner to earn big.

beats.subtext: Anyone can tap into the Shorts Fund.
beats.headline: NO PARTNER, NO PROBLEM

beats.label: FACT
beats.spoken: India's 600 million monthly users fuel the views.

caption.text: India's 600 million monthly users fuel the views.

beats.headline: MASSIVE VIEWERSHIP

asset_hint.prompt: A bustling street in India with people watching videos on their phones.

beats.label: GOAL
beats.spoken: 10 million views in 90 days unlocks max payout.

caption.text: 10 million views in 90 days unlocks max payout.

beats.subtext: Hit the views, get the cash.
beats.headline: UNLOCK EARNINGS

beats.label: TREND
beats.spoken: Shorts are the new money-makers, not long videos.

caption.text: Shorts are the new money-makers, not long videos.

beats.headline: THE NEW GOLDMINE

asset_hint.prompt: Split screen: one side showing a short video being made, the other a long video setup.

script.text: You can earn ₹10 lakh in just 15 seconds. Top YouTubers are raking in ₹5 to ₹12 lakh monthly. No need to be a YouTube Partner to earn big. India's 600 million monthly users fuel the views. 10 million views in 90 days unlocks max payout. Shorts are the new money-makers, not long videos.
script.emotionalArc: Curiosity turns into excitement as viewers discover the surprising earnings potential of short videos.
